{"model":"claude-sonnet-4-5-20250929","id":"msg_01Wctnn2xJMzzcSfzPPricuX","type":"message","role":"assistant","content":[{"type":"thinking","thinking":"Let me calculate 143 × 27 carefully.\n\nI'll break this down:\n143 × 27 = 143 × (20 + 7)\n= 143 × 20 + 143 × 7\n\n143 × 20 = 2,860\n\n143 × 7:\n143 × 7 = (140 + 3) × 7\n= 140 × 7 + 3 × 7\n= 980 + 21\n= 1,001\n\nSo: 2,860 + 1,001 = 3,861\n\nLet me verify this another way:\n143 × 27\n= 143 × 30 - 143 × 3\n= 4,290 - 429\n= 3,861\n\nYes, 143 × 27 = 3,861","signature":""},{"type":"text","text":"To calculate 143 × 27, let me break it down:\n\n143 × 27\n= 143 × (20 + 7)\n= (143 × 20) + (143 × 7)\n= 2,860 + 1,001\n= **3,861**"}],"stop_reason":"end_turn","stop_sequence":null,"stop_details":null,"usage":{"input_tokens":48,"cache_creation_input_tokens":0,"cache_read_input_tokens":0,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":0},"output_tokens":282,"service_tier":"standard","inference_geo":"not_available"}}
